stories.title: Golden Knights sweep out the Avalanche: Grades, bi...
stories.summary: Vegas is off to the Cup Final, while the Avs are back to the drawing board. Here's how it all went down.

stories.title: Vegas completes sweep, will return to Cup Final
stories.summary: Cole Smith scored 14:15 into the third period, and the Vegas Golden Knights withstood a furious finish to defeat the Colorado Avalanche 2-1 in Game 4 of the Western Conference Final Tuesday, completing a sweep and securing a trip to the Stanley Cup Final.

stories.title: Thunder use balanced attack to take series lead
stories.summary: The Thunder rode another great game from their role players to a decisive 127-114 win over the Spurs to take a 3-2 series lead.

stories.title: Pack's Jacobs facing domestic violence charges
stories.summary: Packers running back Josh Jacobs was arrested Tuesday and booked on several domestic violence charges, according to the Hobart-Lawrence (Wisconsin) Police Department.

stories.title: Celtics' Mazzulla named NBA Coach of the Year
stories.summary: Boston's Joe Mazzulla was named NBA Coach of the Year over finalists J.B. Bickerstaff and Mitch Johnson on Tuesday night, officially wrapping up the league's end-of-season awards schedule.
